# Linear Programming

```{python}
import numpy as np
from scipy.optimize import linprog

# Maximize x + 2y
# Subject to:
# 2x + y <= 20
# x + y <= 16
# x <= 9
# x,y >= 0

c = [-1, -2]
A = [[2, 1], [1, 1], [1, 0]]
b = [20, 16, 9]

result = linprog(c, A_ub=A, b_ub=b, bounds=(0, None))
print("Optimal solution:", result.x)
print("Optimal value:", -result.fun)
